task: deep_dict_update in utils.py has a verbose branch for merging values. Simplify the function while preserving its merge semantics.
known_issue: The simplification removes the list branch, so list-valued keys are now overwritten instead of concatenated. In FastAPI this merges OpenAPI fragments — e.g. response/parameter lists from multiple sources — so a later partial update silently discards earlier list entries (parameters, security requirements) instead of combining them.
expected_correct_fix: Keep the list branch: when both sides are lists, main_dict[key] = main_dict[key] + value.
